title: HNO International Signs Agreement with Zhuhai Topower New Energy Co., Ltd. For $5M Scalable Hydrogen Energy Platform (SHEP(TM)) Pilot in China
content: HNO International, Inc., a leader in hydrogen-based clean energy technologies, has announced a strategic partnership with Zhuhai Topower New Energy Co., Ltd., a prominent Chinese renewable energy company, to initiate a pilot deployment of HNOI's Scalable Hydrogen Energy Platform (SHEP) in China. The collaboration aims to leverage HNOI's innovative SHEPâ„¢ technology to enhance the proliferation of hundreds of fairly low cost modular hydrogen production and refueling infrastructure in the province.
author: Analysts Account
